title: Intelligence Specialist
description: Collects, analyzes, and disseminates intelligence information to support Marine Corps combat operations and planning.

title: Geographic Intelligence Specialist
description: Analyzes terrain, weather, and geospatial data to produce intelligence products supporting Marine operations.

title: Rifleman
description: Serves as the primary infantry Marine, executing close combat operations and direct fire engagements.

title: Machine Gunner
description: Employs crew-served machine guns to provide suppressive fire and support infantry maneuver elements.

title: Mortarman
description: Operates mortars to provide indirect fire support to infantry units during offensive and defensive operations.

title: Anti-Tank Missileman
description: Employs anti-tank missile systems to destroy enemy armored vehicles and fortified positions.

title: Radio Operator
description: Installs, operates, and maintains tactical radio communications systems to support command and control.

title: Network Administrator
description: Installs, configures, and maintains computer networks and data communications systems for Marine units.

title: Cannoneer
description: Operates and maintains artillery weapons systems to deliver indirect fire support to ground combat forces.

title: Fire Support Marine
description: Coordinates and directs fire support from artillery, naval gunfire, and close air support for ground units.

title: Electrician
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems, wiring, and power distribution equipment on Marine installations.

title: Refrigeration/AC Mechanic
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs refrigeration, air conditioning, and heating systems for Marine Corps facilities.

title: Water Support Technician
description: Operates and maintains water purification and distribution systems to provide potable water in field environments.

title: Engineer Equipment Operator
description: Operates heavy construction equipment such as bulldozers, graders, and excavators for engineering projects.

title: Combat Engineer
description: Performs construction, demolition, and obstacle emplacement and breaching in support of ground combat operations.

title: Cyber Operations Specialist
description: Conducts offensive and defensive cyber operations to protect Marine networks and exploit adversary systems.

title: AAV Crewman
description: Operates and performs crew-level maintenance on Assault Amphibious Vehicles during ship-to-shore operations.

title: Small Arms Repairer
description: Inspects, services, and repairs all small arms and crew-served weapons in the Marine Corps inventory.

title: Ammunition Technician
description: Receives, stores, issues, and maintains all classes of ammunition and explosives for Marine units.

title: Special Communications Operator
description: Operates and maintains specialized communications systems supporting sensitive intelligence operations.

title: Electronic Intelligence Interceptor
description: Collects and analyzes enemy electronic signals to produce actionable intelligence for Marine operations.

title: Ground Radio Repairer
description: Performs maintenance, troubleshooting, and repair on ground-based tactical radio communications equipment.

title: Supply Administration
description: Manages supply transactions, maintains property records, and coordinates logistics support for Marine units.

title: Warehouse Clerk
description: Receives, stores, inventories, and issues equipment and supplies to support Marine Corps logistical operations.

title: Food Service Specialist
description: Prepares and serves meals to Marines in garrison and field environments following nutritional standards.

title: Motor Vehicle Operator
description: Operates wheeled military vehicles to transport personnel, equipment, and supplies in support of operations.

title: Military Police
description: Enforces laws and regulations, conducts investigations, and provides security on Marine Corps installations.

title: Correctional Specialist
description: Manages Marine Corps correctional facilities and supervises inmates to ensure safety and order.

title: Aircraft Maintenance Admin
description: Manages aviation maintenance databases and information systems to track aircraft readiness and parts.

title: Aviation Operations Specialist
description: Plans and coordinates flight operations, scheduling, and airfield management for Marine aviation units.
